But after like a week of playing nonstop with my friends, the game started to get boring and repetitive. Even when I tried to play, the more I played, the more it got WAY too boring. And since I played for a week nonstop, I can’t return it, I got let down and haven’t played it since then. Now it’s just sitting in my library just waiting for the next day. This game was a game I wanted for a while just to be let down. Very disappointed with this game☹️☹️☹️

reviews.review_title: NO CAMPAIGN!!! NO DRIVING THE ECTO 1
reviews.review_description:
There should be a law against making a Ghostbusters game with no campaign and ability to drive the ecto 1. I would rather play Ghostbusters on the Sega Master System. At least then I would get a full campaign with ecto 1 driving and more ghost variety than this lame excuse for a game.

I wish it wasnt too late to get a refund, however i was too busy enjoying a Meta Quest + free trial.
Its a good game dont get me wrong but theres a few bugs, few content, and hasnt been updated since the most rencent Ghostbusters movie

reviews.review_title: Never played something so boring and bad
reviews.review_description: As huge Ghostbusters fans, my friends and I were really looking forward to this game. We were massively disappointed. The “campaign” was over in just an hour. After that, all that’s left are repetitive missions with the same boring gameplay. The art style is okay—subjective taste—but the game is clearly made for kids. The characters are extremely woke, and the sound and gadgets don’t look anything like they do in the movies. Honestly, this game is a pure cash grab, probably just to keep the license. There’s no love put into it, you don’t even see the Ecto-1 in motion, and the storytelling is so dull it puts you to sleep. The three of us all wish we could request a refund. Biggest disappointment on the Quest so far.

While the game does give you the thing you’d hope for in blasting ghosts and throwing catchers, it’s narrative is slight to say the least - a barebones structure propping up what amounts to a set of mini-games they hope you’ll play with friends.

The single player can be beaten without even playing through all the mini-games and the Frozen Empire add-on is the exact same mini-games with an added proton pack power and a little Dan Ackroyd.

It’s no way worth full price but if you can get a deal and understand what you’re in for it can be fun.

NOTE: The game allows teleport locomotion but it will not work for picking things up and moving them as well as dodging. You must move in-game but they do provide side blinders that greatly help.

as a big fan of the ghostbusters I think it’s needs more stuff to it you can’t even drive or see inside the Ecto 1  doing the same thing over and over it gets boring it was fun at first but now it’s just boring please add more stuff 
￼I would not recommend it if your a big fan of the ghostbusters and looking for something fun

I really love this game! Purchased my Meta 2 mainly to play this game, and it didn't disappoint. My only sadness is that they seem to be done adding more content.

If anyone ever needs another adult Ghostbuster to join them, send me an add! Happy to set up a shift at the firehall with you!
It’s fun and when you think you’re done there’s always more!

reviews.review_title: A very fun game is need to fix something
reviews.review_description: This is a very fun game where you can blast ghost and fight with your friends n the customization for your proton pack and character but whenever you shoot while moving around it’s off the center of the gun idk if it’s normal but that’s all

I have one more idea of a mission mane add some in the San Francisco fire house too!
(Special occasion to stay forever!)
Lag my vr

This game is a lot of fun, and I think the last update was a step in the right direction. I would love more updates like Frozen Empire which add a campaign to the game, which I think is more fun then a campaign where you just do random missions. Maybe you could do one based on the first movie, or even make a version of the main story where it is a specifically made set of levels, like the Frozen Empire update. Overall, great game, want more updates!

Absolutely love this game! Critically speaking I would rate it a 3.5 out of 5 as it does have some issues which I'll outline below, but from a fun factor and nostalgia perspective it's an absolutely 5 out of 5, which I've rated it. My 11 year old daughter fell in love with Ghostbusters when she was 6 or 7, and myself as a lifelong fan quickly found myself obtaining jumpsuits and proton packs and we've gone as Ghostbusters the last 4 Halloweens in a row. 

On to the game... what can I say? It's great. It captures most of the feeling of the PS3 game, despite the animated/cell-shaded structure. The story is thin, at least what I've explored thus far, with the rest of the game containing the same 6 options in 6 or so different maps. Wrangling ghosts and stuffing them into traps is a blast. We have spent more time busting ghosts together than any other Quest game. 

Now, on to my few gripes. Since I've seen some dev response on other Meta reviews here, I sincerely hope they see this review at some point. 
My biggest gripe by far is the fact that that sound effects on the particle thrower are almost non-existent. The volume is SO LOW and completely drowned out by everything else. It's so disappointing since the proton beam should be the loudest thing, but instead you can barely hear it. I've toggled every volume option trying to adjust it and make it louder and it just doesn't work. Please please please make the thrower it's own volume slider in the settings so I can turn everything else down. 

My second issue is that the '84 wand, the only one I use, it's too small in your hands. 
It needs a 20% increase in size. It's also a shame that both wands don't connect to a hose and are free floating. It seems  that should be a pretty easy correction in an update. I also discovered just today that the main game wand has additional upgrades that the '84 wand doesn't have, which is weird. 
I'm out of space...would LOVE to submit more to the Devs! THANK YOU for making this game!!
Mpöey

Wow... after 1 year and still no controller based movement added to the game. Another lazy release of a game with 1 movement option being head based WHICH IS the worst ESPECIALLY in a game where your constantly having to move while looking / aiming so your CONSTANTLY fighting against the angle of movement when looking around.

Im supposed the game doesnt only have snap turn also like other lazy releases.

And who actually tested the game mechanics????

So we played the mode where your timed and jusy have to get as many as possible, you drain the blue bar of a ghost and then start draining the pink bar while pulling against it.

Seems fine until there are multiple big ghosts constantly crossing over eachother which moves the lock from 1 to another.

THEN if the lock comes off the main ghost your draining the pink bar off they vanish!! And come back after around 6 or 7 seconds where you then need to do it over again!!

This would make some kind of sense if you could fix your lock on them as it took around 4 attempts due to a 2nd ghost constantly getting in the way, in a room that could barely fit a few people in, nevermind 3 large ghosts and 3 floating heads constantly flying into you which funnily enough you then TRY to aim at those but now the beam stays locked onto the big ghost at the back of the room while the head is in your face CLEARLY being aimed right at but no the lock doesnt care about switching now.

Amazing game mechanics.

Oh and to top it off i tried the MR mode again.

It started ok, the bag spawned, out popped the little guy etc.

Then just before the roof starts to crack, the left and right wall from where i was facing had the swirly design even thought the roof wasnt removed yet.

It was only from the middle of the wall to the top, on 2 sides of the room.
The roof then got removed to show the marshmellow man and then it was all kinds of messed up. Im pretty sure it was only normally the room that goes, i had the roof, 2 half sides of the wall, but parts of the wall that was left went passed the parts that were purple.

Hard to explain but i can assure you it was totally broken. I exited the mode and exited the game.

I just picked this back up for £4 with an 85% code.

Dont bother. I still probably wouldnt play it again if it was free.

I give this whole experience 5 stars because it is not only fun but it’s very stimulating, I love this game and I highly recommend it to people of all ages. Thanks so much for giving us experiences like this and I hope the developers continue creating more of these experiences.

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for playing and enjoying our game, and we are so glad to hear you've been having a great Ghostbusting experience :)

reviews.review_description: Game is so boring. How do I refund if bought with meta credit?
W game mini putt mayhem 🗿🗿🗿 the actually  game ♥️♥️♥️🗿🗿🗿  containment  pack 🗿🗿🗿🗿🗿 🗿 💯 5 stars 🗿🗿🗿🗿🗿🗿🗿

Now I’m not some professional game reviewer, in fact i’m just a kid. But I’m a big fan of ghostbusters and care deeply about the movies and games and I want to guide the developers by giving a few suggestions. I love the game already but I just wanna give some feedback. I suggest you have a gamemode simply titled ”Ghost Hunt”.

Where you go to a random location and look for a ghost. No directions on the P.K.E, no Medusas or other swarmers and only one ghost. One random ghost. You and your team speak through walkie talkies and you have to find the ghost only by the activity given by the P.K.E. So no directions or markers on the radar. That’s it. And to make the match longer. You could make it so that the ghost can escape from one room to another if the ghostbusters take too long to bust it and you have to re-find it.

And another thing you should add is an option to turn off healthbars on the ghosts since they are big and kinda ruin it on the realistic part.

These are not complaints, they are just words from a fan that wants you to be on the right path.

I played the frozen empire missions and thought it was so cool to wield the original 1984 proton wand. But i was a little dissapointed when i realized after the missions we just go back to the redesign. It’s not a bad redesign but I would like an option to choose original or redesign. Like choose if you either want New York HQ or San Francisco HQ. Same goes for proton pack, music and Ecto 1.

And I want to feel like an actual Ghostbuster. So instead of choosing locations and missions just add a phone so that you have to wait for a call. And add activities in the HQ like cooking or playing chess to pass the time while you wait for a call. I have also realized that when in missions the epic music starts even before a ghost attacks. Whats up with that?

And add a character creator to let us define our personality. Not much but just a few hairstyles and face presets. Thats it!

Oh and also make an option to turn of the AI companion because it feels very wierd having a ghostbuster ghost pop up all the time.

And Please let us get in the Ecto.

- a Ghostbusters fan

developer_response.body:
Hi Davidoexpresso,

Thank you so much for your kind and thoughtful review! Our team takes player feedback seriously, so we really appreciate it. We hope you continue to enjoy the game, and thank you for playing!

reviews.review_description: When I bought it, I was expecting a game similar to the one on the 360.  It's not.  There is not really a story mode after the tutorial.  As soon as the tutorial was over, it threw me into the online mode.  Personally, I don't want to play games online, especially when there are huge age gaps between the players. The menus are clunky and are not spatially placed properly. Honestly, it feels like a rushed, unfinished product.

developer_response.body:
Hi there,

Sorry to hear about your experience. The game has a campaign that follows a narrative driven experience with the Frozen Empire mission pack which was released last week! So please feel free to check that out and let us know what you think :)  With regards to online play, the game can be played solo with offline mode where you will be assisted by the ghost companion.

Thank you for playing our game!

developer_response.body:
Hi there,

We're glad to hear our game has delivered to the expectations of Ghostbusters fans like yourself! Slimer Hunt update focuses on the atmosphere similar to the movies.

We have announced the new Frozen Empire mission pack in our socials which continues to provide you with a movie like experience. Thank you for playing our game and we're looking forward to hearing your thoughts!

reviews.review_description: It needs more people and maps and modes. its sad because I love ghostbusters but not lot of people don't know it but if more people played the game it would be more fun

developer_response.body:
Hey Travis,

Just wanted to update you that we released the Frozen Empire mission pack, which features a more narrative focused mission series, some of which take place in a new location! So please give that a whirl and let us know what you think :)
---
Thank you for the review and feedback! We appreciate you as a fan of Ghostbusters and want what's the best for the game, future content will continue to align with the movie franchise and we hope you will enjoy the additional content that will be provided. If you have more suggestions, please join the discord or email us through GhostbustersVR_Support@spe.sony.co,

Thank you for playing our game and we're excited to hear what you think of upcoming content.

reviews.review_description: I think the devs did a great job capturing a lot of the spirit of GB.  As. Child of the 80s, thumbs up.  The mechanics are clever and better than expected.  Keep it up guys, playing this with my kids is super.

developer_response.body: Hi there, thank you for leaving a review! We are so glad to hear you and your children are enjoying the game and we hope it's bringing back many memories!

reviews.review_title: Ghostbusters: Rise of the Ghost Lord
reviews.review_description: In my hour of playtime I gotta say, the equipment may not what I was hoping for, but the game is a blast when blasting and tethering ghosts and putting them into a trap. The gameplay can be a bit janky at times but I believe they’re gonna patch it with time. Other than that I’d recommend this to people who want to feel like a Ghostbuster.

developer_response.body: Hi there! Thank you so much for leaving this review - its great to hear that you're enjoying the game. We've got plenty more content planned for the next couple months (you may have seen our roadmap?), and will also be bringing general improvements to gameplay which will hopefully smoothen out some of the minor issues you are experiencing. Thank you again, and we hope you continue to enjoy the game!

Thank you for letting us know your thoughts on our game, and we hope you are able to continue playing and enjoying our game!

reviews.review_description: People are calling this a bad ghost busters game. Which is understandable but it is a good VR game and you literally get what you asked for, you bust a lot of ghosts.

Upon pre-ordering the game, I found myself initially grappling with mixed emotions. My early experiences were marred by a blend of confusion over the gameplay mechanics and frustration due to technical glitches, particularly with the 1.1 patch. This rocky start left me questioning my purchase decision.

However, as time progressed, my perspective shifted remarkably. I began to unravel the intricacies of the gameplay, discovering an engaging and immersive world that cleverly plays on the nostalgia of the Ghostbusters franchise while introducing innovative elements that keep the experience fresh and exciting.

What truly transformed my opinion was witnessing the developers' commitment to improving the game. Their responsiveness to feedback and dedication to resolving issues have been commendable. Each update not only fixed existing problems but also enhanced the game, making it more enjoyable and robust.

Now, looking back, I see "Ghostbusters: Rise of the Ghost Lord" as a fascinating game that has evolved significantly since its release. The journey from my initial disappointment to my current satisfaction highlights the dynamic nature of VR gaming, where a game can transform and grow over time, much like the players themselves.

In conclusion, the game stands as a testament to the developers' dedication to their craft and their audience. It's a game that, despite its initial hiccups, has matured into a compelling experience that I'm pleased to have in my collection.

developer_response.body: Wow! Thanks for those kind words. If you think of the improvements implemented so far  to get us to Patch 2.1 imagine the game at Patch 10.1. This is going to the ever evolving home of Ghostbusters VR for old and new fans alike.  Have you seen the  'Frozen Empire' trailer :)

reviews.review_description: Overall it should have been a of the year such a good game It is very worthwhile and worth it from one true fan to the next who you gonna call.

developer_response.body: Hey there, thank you for your review! We are so glad to hear you are enjoying the game!

reviews.review_description: This game sucks up your battery 🪫 very quickly and is high demanding on internet 🛜 if you don’t have a minimum of 400 megs (you will need I high broadband internet for multiplayer (I have a 1000 meg)) you will get disconnected a lot and see the ghost flicker. The game at times will bug up from technical difficulties like a ghost will get stuck under the map or tethering a eye 👁️ will never come out or the gold never goes down or sometimes your proton beam just doesn’t fire at all in which case you never complete a course or get money to upgrade your gear. This game needs a serious upgrade, but if you’re under 10 yrs old maybe you like flaying your arms around and having no progression in your game then this is for you.

developer_response.body: Hi there, thanks for leaving this review. We're sorry to hear that you're experiencing these issues. The team are working hard to address feedback and to bring updates and improvements to the game. However, your particular issues seem uniquely severe - therefore, we would encourage you to send us an email to support@ndreams.com to explain in further detail your issues.

reviews.review_description:
I preorderd the full containment edition (and got charged for it) but was only able to install the standard edition!
The devs responded quickly and everything is as it should be now. Game is a lot of fun. Wish there was a better offline option. I dont mind playing with a bunch of kids but not exclusively.

developer_response.body: Thanks for updating your review! We hope that you're enjoying the game. If you'd prefer to play the game in single-player mode, you can do so by exiting the game in the main hub and then disabling multiplayer in the options menu. We are currently working on a fix that will streamline the process of turning off multiplayer right from the beginning. This improvement will be available soon.

reviews.review_description: After the update I can't open the game because there is not enough space, does anyone know how many more gigabytes it requires?

developer_response.body:
Update: Development say the overall size has increased by 500MB since launch day. Hope that helps you solve the issue. Thanks

Thanks for the positive feedback. I will find out if there is a significant diff in the file size for you. Watch this space. Thanks.

reviews.review_description: This is a gorgeous game from its set pieces, gadgets, to its immersive play with friends!!! It’s sooo much fun! Love how you can be revived with a high five too!! It’s a world class VR multiplayer game!

developer_response.body: Thanks for the feedback. That is much appreciated. We have a new mode landing tonight, 'Heist and Seek', I think you will enjoy it.

reviews.review_description:
The graphics are awesome and the music really makes the experience very suspenseful. I love the different ways to fight against the ghosts and how versatile they are.
The character designs are also sooo cool!!
I definitely recommend this game to all the ghostbusters lovers and of course people who want to experience a slightly scary and accion filled game!

developer_response.body: Thanks for the feedback, really glad you enjoyed the game.

reviews.review_description: I first tried out the game at a friend's house when he showed me the MR mini-game. It was so cool! Now I have my own copy of the game and we play together with our team of friends. I found the soundtrack really good and nostalgic and I don't mind the art-style at all! Yes, it's more cartoony, but still characters and equipment has nice details, fun expression animations and it's clearly aimed to attract younger audiances too. Overall, had lots of fun with it, can't wait for more updates to come!
